query: multiple exposure layered scenes blended frames analog film
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / double_exposure: multiple exposure layered scenes

response.objective_caption: An overhead view of two people walking on a bright surface, seen from directly above. One figure wears a striped sweater and carries a backpack, while the other wears a puffy jacket and holds a bag, with their head tilted upward toward the camera. The scene is rendered in warm, pale sepia tones.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An overhead view of two people walking on a blown-out, nearly white surface, seen from directly above with extreme overexposure that obscures most ground detail. One figure wears a striped sweater and carries a backpack, while the other wears a puffy jacket and holds a bag, with their head tilted upward. The image is rendered in washed-out, faded sepia tones with crushed highlight detail, and the subjects appear as softened, low-contrast shapes with minimal surface texture or fine features visible.
